opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My face is completely on fire. It's bright red, burning and stinging, and it's suddenly covered in these painful little whitehead spots that popped up after I had some wine out in the sun yesterday. I'm really scared it's a bad infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on fast in the last day and the burning is horrible and embarrassing — I want to know if it's a serious infection and get something to calm it down before I can see my own GP.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 24 hours ago, after a day out in the sun with a couple of glasses of wine
symptom_narrative.duration: one day and it flared up fast
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning and stinging across the cheeks and nose, with a sudden crop of small red bumps and pus-filled whitehead spots on top of skin that is already flushed
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the burning is really distressing and the way it looks is mortifying
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the middle of my face — both cheeks, my nose and my chin, quite evenly on both sides
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant burning since it started; my face has always gone red and flushed easily with heat, wine or sun but it has never erupted like this
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: cool air on my face and fanning it seems to ease the burning a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: heat, the sun and the wine yesterday seemed to set it off

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: my face has flushed and gone red easily for years, especially with heat, alcohol or spicy food

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: over-the-counter exfoliating facial scrubs and an acid toner I use most days

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: very self-conscious and embarrassed about how the face looks; had wine and sun exposure the day before it flared

objective_data_offered.value: on video the middle of the face looks strikingly red across both cheeks and the nose, with small visible thread-like veins, and a scattering of small red bumps and tiny pus-topped spots sitting on the red areas; the redness looks even on both sides and does not have a hard raised sharply-outlined edge
I don't feel sick in myself — no fever, no shivers, I'm not hot and cold, just my face burning
there are no blackheads or clogged pores in it, it's more like sudden inflamed bumps and whiteheads
my eyes are fine — they're not red, sore or gritty, and my vision is normal
the skin feels hot and burning to me but it isn't hard or tight or swelling up, and it hasn't spread down my neck
